suggestions.title: Benchmark TF32 on your real training path before the next run
suggestions.description: You asked yesterday whether `enable_tf32=false` hurts efficiency, which is usually a sign an expensive training run is about to happen. Codex can wire up a small apples-to-apples benchmark in this repo and tell you the actual throughput and loss-drift tradeoff instead of leaving this as a guess.
suggestions.prompt: 请在这个项目里直接做一个最小但可信的 benchmark，对比 `enable_tf32=true` 和 `false` 在我当前训练路径上的速度、显存和数值差异。优先复用我现有训练入口，给我一个能直接跑的脚本，并说明我应该默认用哪个设置。

suggestions.title: Finish the multi-GPU native BPB launcher around `eval/text_likelihood.py`
suggestions.description: Your June 8 thread says you want `script/eval/run_native_bpb.sh` to work like `run_unified_bpb.sh`, which looks like an immediate missing artifact in this repo rather than a vague improvement. Codex can implement the launcher, batch multiple models across GPUs, and make the output/logging match the workflow you already use.
suggestions.prompt: 请继续完成这个项目里的 `script/eval/run_native_bpb.sh`，目标是像 `script/eval/run_unified_bpb.sh` 一样支持多卡、多模型批量跑 `eval/text_likelihood.py`。请先检查我现在仓库里已有的脚本和配置，再直接补齐可运行版本以及对应的日志/参数处理。
